NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROBINSON, JAMES (PP) L.

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING APR-15-2002 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT HAVING REVIEWED THE FILE FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANCIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDERS AND RULES. THE COURT FINDS THAT A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: RHONDA AQUILINA. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2002 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed without prejudice. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Rhonda Aquilina. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-14-2002 Continued To Apr-15-02 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 4/15/2002 at 1:30 PM in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2001 Continued To Feb-11-02 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Pro per is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 2/11/02 at 1:30 PM, in dept. 212. Proceedings reported by: Valerie Papale. Written sanction order not mailed. Court advised by Department of Corrections that plaintiff was paroled. (212)
